title: Email verification required for Azure AD SSO login
symptom: After authenticating with Azure AD, n8n displays an error stating 'Email needs to be verified', preventing login completion.
not_this_if: Using a version of n8n later than 1.103.0
root_cause: The error occurs because n8n requires that the email associated with the Azure AD account be verified before allowing login. This is a security measure to ensure that only verified users can access the system.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 1.103.0 or later
Ensure that the email addresses used in Azure AD are verified
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 1.103.0 or later to resolve the email verification issue.
